page_content: HISP630 Preservation Policy and Planning (3 Credits) An opportunity is provided to look in depth at the national historic preservation program that is the federal, tribal, state, and local (city and county) public sector preservation activities being undertaken in accordance with public policy set by laws, regulations, standards, and guidelines. Prerequisite: Permission of ARCH-Historic Preservation Program. Credit Only Granted for: HISP619M or HISP630. Formerly: HISP619M.
